summary: Completed testing of VideoPlayerModal fix. All features working correctly - videos uploaded through admin dashboard now display and play correctly on candidate dashboard using actual video_url instead of hardcoded sample videos.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

critical_code_review_comments: VideoPlayerModal.jsx correctly uses video.video_url instead of hardcoded SAMPLE_VIDEOS
YouTube URL conversion to embed format working correctly (e.g., youtube.com/watch?v=xxx → youtube.com/embed/xxx?autoplay=1)
Vimeo URL conversion also implemented correctly
Direct video file URLs use HTML5 video player as expected
data-testid attributes present for video-player-iframe and video-player elements
updated_files: /app/tests/test_video_player_feature.py - Created comprehensive test suite for video player feature
seed_data_creation: Test videos created and cleaned up during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: VideoPlayerModal fix verified working. Videos uploaded via admin panel with YouTube URLs are correctly converted to embed format and played in iframe. Direct video URLs use HTML5 video player. The 'Admin Uploaded Test Video' with YouTube URL https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ correctly plays as https://www.youtube.com/embed/dQw4w9WgXcQ?autoplay=1

videos_stored_with_video_url.details: Videos created via admin panel have correct video_url stored in database

api_returns_video_url.details: GET /api/resources/videos returns videos with video_url field for unlocked videos

video_player_uses_actual_url.details: VideoPlayerModal uses video.video_url instead of hardcoded sample videos

direct_video_url_support.details: Direct video file URLs use HTML5 video player with data-testid='video-player'
